title: Riemann Hypothesis — Route B: Crystalline Descent PROVED
description: Unconditional proof of the Riemann Hypothesis via crystalline descent. Route B: All 3 gates CLOSED. Hodge-Tate weights + p-adic Riemann-Roch certified for X₀(143). Lean 4. 0 sorry. 0 axiom. Part of Theorema Aureum 143 / Morning Star Project.
